captures.caption: Press fire and a yellow bullet launches from the ship and streaks up the screen, vanishing off the top.
captures.alt: A short yellow bullet appears at the ship and travels straight up the screen, disappearing off the top edge.

captures.caption: Fire with the ship on the right half of the screen and the bullet appears way over on the left — only the low byte of the ship's X was copied, not its 9th bit.
captures.alt: The ship is at the right of the screen, but when fire is pressed the bullet appears on the far left and flies up there, nowhere near the ship.

captures.caption: With the 9th bit copied across, the same shot from the right launches correctly from under the ship.
captures.alt: The ship is at the right of the screen, and when fire is pressed the bullet launches from directly beneath it and flies up, staying on the right.
